name: upstream_extras
description: Article entries discovered on marxists.org during Step 2 discovery that were NOT matched to any canonical 毛泽东选集 vol 1-4 title. Kept here rather than in the main manifest so the main corpus stays at the clean 158 毛选 entries, but preserved for possible future expansion (毛泽东文集, 建国以来毛泽东文稿, 未收入选集 pieces).
